title: The Seraphim Enter the Stage
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Blackbeard, Seraphim as Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.
scene: Blackbeard attacks Amazon Lily, the Seraphim appear, and Rayleigh forces a stalemate around Boa Hancock.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Times Belong To You Youngsters Now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE ISLE OF WOMEN - AMAZON LILY, CALM BELT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The town is in bad shape.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the first time in history men have invaded like this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as I'm here, the Navy won't stop coming.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But where in the world would I go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're under fire! The Kula are resisting!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: deploy the new pacifistas! The seraphims should be on the front lines!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still not ready to come out and face us, Hancock?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Get ready to record what happens!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is that?! I can't fight a child!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The chapter of Overwhelming Strength.....!! Also...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Attention!! Report from the shore!! Pirates incoming!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Zehaha! I've come for the pirate empress!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WON'T LET A POWER LIKE HERS FALL INTO THE NAVY'S CLUTCHES!!

summary: This part advances the Amazon Lily / World Aftermath through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
